scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix products-service
scripts.start: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,PRODUCTS" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" "npm start --prefix api-gateway" "npm start --prefix auth-service" "npm start --prefix products-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "GATEWAY,AUTH,PRODUCTS" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,green" "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix products-service"
